codeErrorGuardPlus.enable.description: Enable or disable deterministic try/catch commands.
codeErrorGuardPlus.defaultLanguage.descr: Language used when the active document type cannot be inferred.
codeErrorGuardPlus.customTemplates.descr: Override built-in try/catch templates with workspace-specific structures.
codeErrorGuardPlus.customTemplates.langu: Programming language that receives this custom try/catch template (e.g., 'javascript', 'python', 'dart').
codeErrorGuardPlus.menu.editor.label: CodeErrorGuard+
codeErrorGuardPlus.listTryCatchView.welc:
To effectively capture files, ensure you include the file type within the workspace settings.
[Open Workspace Setting](command:workbench.action.openWorkspaceSettingsFile)
To learn more about how to use the Starter Kit [read our docs](https://github.com/ManuelGil/vscode-code-error-guard-plus).
